name: io.github.PonzuTech/ponzu
description: ERC-20 token launchpad on Ethereum — deploy, presale, swap, and farm via AI agents

environmentVariables.description: Private key for signing transactions (optional, enables write operations)
environmentVariables.name: PONZU_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum RPC URL (defaults to public RPCs)
environmentVariables.name: PONZU_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Network to use: mainnet or sepolia (default: mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: PONZU_NETWORK
